description: Simple-track prompt templates. {reference} is the localized human reference (from the version's own book names); {version_title} and {version_abbrev} come from version.json. A global system prompt (bible_bench.prompts.BENCHMARK_SYSTEM_PROMPT) already tells the model to wrap quotes in quotation marks and include the reference, so these per-item prompts no longer forbid that; the scorer strips any quotes/reference before aligning against the actual verse. Native-language wording is machine-drafted and pending human localization review (see docs).

quote_exact.eng: Quote {reference} from the {version_title} ({version_abbrev}) translation of the Bible. Give only the verse itself, with no commentary or explanation.
quote_exact.spa: Cita {reference} de la traducción {version_title} ({version_abbrev}) de la Biblia. Responde solo con el versículo mismo, sin comentarios ni explicaciones.
quote_exact.kor: 성경 {version_title}({version_abbrev}) 번역에서 {reference}을(를) 인용해 주세요. 구절 자체만 답하고, 해설이나 설명은 넣지 마세요.
quote_exact.tha: โปรดยกข้อพระคัมภีร์ {reference} จากฉบับแปล {version_title} ({version_abbrev}) ตอบเฉพาะตัวข้อพระคัมภีร์เท่านั้น ไม่ต้องมีคำอธิบายหรือคำขยายความ
quote_exact.arb: اقتبس {reference} من ترجمة {version_title} ({version_abbrev}) للكتاب المقدس. أجب بنص الآية نفسها فقط، دون تعليق أو شرح.

english_instruction_fallback: Quote {reference} from the {version_title} ({version_abbrev}) translation of the Bible. Give only the verse itself, with no commentary or explanation.
